title: Watch Your Whiskers, Stilton!
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: A one-eyed rival tries to ruin Geronimo's newspaper, so he goes on a deadly game show to win a million dollars and save the day! 📰

q.en: What is the name of the rival newspaper that takes over every newsstand and bookstore?
q.zh: 那家挤占了所有报摊和书店的报纸叫什么名字？

explain.en: A one-eyed rat pays newsdealers and bookstores to sell only The Roaring Rat and sends Geronimo's papers to the recycling center.
explain.zh: 一只独眼老鼠花钱让报摊和书店只卖《咆哮鼠报》，还把杰罗尼摩的报纸送去回收站。

q.en: The mysterious one-eyed rat who tries to ruin Geronimo is really who?
q.zh: 那个想要搞垮杰罗尼摩的神秘独眼老鼠，真实身份是谁？

options.en: William Shortpaws according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 威廉·肖特波（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Thea uncovers that the mystery rat is Flusher Pottypaws, a very rich mouse who used to make toilets.
explain.zh: 蒂奥查出那个神秘老鼠就是弗拉舍·波蒂波，一只曾经制造马桶的超级富豪老鼠。

q.en: What business did Flusher Pottypaws run before he tried publishing?
q.zh: 弗拉舍·波蒂波在尝试出版业之前，做的是什么生意？

options.en: Selling ice to Eskimice according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 给爱斯基摩老鼠卖冰（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Until three days earlier he owned a company that made sanitary fittings — 'toilets to you and me,' as Thea says.
explain.zh: 直到三天前，他还拥有一家生产卫生洁具的公司——用蒂奥的话说就是“马桶”。

q.en: Which super-salesmouse does Geronimo call to help sell the papers?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩请来帮忙卖报纸的“超级销售鼠”是谁？

explain.en: Geronimo answers an ad for Shif T. Paws, his old business manager, who bursts in shouting 'Watch your whiskers, here comes Shif T. Paws!'
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩回应了希夫特·波的招聘广告，这位昔日经理冲进来大喊“当心你的胡须，希夫特·波来啦！”

q.en: Where do Geronimo and his staff set up their temporary office?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩和员工们把临时办公室设在了哪里？

options.en: The television studio according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 电视台演播室（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Bagel Buckwheat's bakery basement at 85 Curds Court
options.zh: 贝格尔·巴克韦特位于奶酪凝块巷85号的面包房地窖

explain.en: Mousella's cousin Bagel Buckwheat lets them use his large bakery basement at 85 Curds Court as their new base.
explain.zh: 秘书莫塞拉的表兄贝格尔·巴克韦特让他们使用自己位于奶酪凝块巷85号的面包房地窖作为新据点。

q.en: On what dangerous live TV game show does Geronimo agree to appear?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩答应参加的是哪个危险的电视直播游戏节目？

explain.en: Shif T. Paws enters Geronimo as the next contestant on The Mousetrap, a spooky midnight game show held at the Top TV studios.
explain.zh: 希夫特·波把杰罗尼摩报成了《捕鼠夹》的下一位选手，那是一档在顶级电视台午夜播出的恐怖游戏节目。

q.en: Who hosts The Mousetrap and looks like a vampire rat?
q.zh: 《捕鼠夹》的主持人像吸血鬼老鼠一样，他是谁？

options.en: Ledger Moneymouse according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 莱杰·莫尼鼠（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Host Vlad Torturetail is pale with pointed teeth, wears a black suit, white shirt, and red cape — he looks just like a vampire rat.
explain.zh: 主持人弗拉德·托彻泰尔脸色苍白、长着尖牙，身穿黑西装、白衬衫，披着红斗篷——活像一只吸血鬼老鼠。

q.en: On The Mousetrap, what happens if Geronimo gives a wrong answer?
q.zh: 在《捕鼠夹》里，如果杰罗尼摩答错了会发生什么？

options.en: The trap pinches or chops off his tail
options.zh: 捕鼠夹会夹住或夹断他的尾巴

options.en: He gets dumped with water according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他会被人泼一身水（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The player sits in a mousetrap; a wrong answer releases the spring, which pinches — or even chops off — the contestant's tail on live TV.
explain.zh: 选手坐在捕鼠夹里，答错就会触发弹簧，在直播中夹住甚至夹断参赛者的尾巴。

q.en: According to Geronimo, what is the original meaning of the word 'Halloween'?
q.zh: 按照杰罗尼摩的说法，“万圣节”这个词最初的意思是什么？

options.en: Hollow Evening according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 空洞之夜（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Geronimo explains the Celts were first to celebrate it, and the word comes from All Hallows' Eve.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩解释说凯尔特人最早庆祝这个节日，而这个词的来源是“诸圣节前夕”。

q.en: What publishing house do Geronimo and Pottypaws plan to start together?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩和波蒂波打算一起创办的出版社叫什么？

explain.en: Shif T. Paws suggests they team up; Geronimo names it First-rat Art (Pottypaws had wanted 'Toilet Art').
explain.zh: 希夫特·波建议两人合作，杰罗尼摩把它命名为“一流艺术出版社”（波蒂波原本想叫“马桶艺术”）。
